creator: nollan@phreaker.net
text:
acd0: DVDR <TSSTcorp DVD+/-RW TS-L632H/D200> at ata0-master UDMA33
acd0: FAILURE - READ_BIG MEDIUM ERROR asc=0x11 ascq=0x00 
GEOM_LABEL: Label for provider acd0 is iso9660/FreeBSD_Install.
acd0: FAILURE - READ_BIG MEDIUM ERROR asc=0x11 ascq=0x00 

The error is non-critical, still able to use cd, but i guess i wanted
to give some feedback on this one...

How-To-Repeat: reboot d830 with FreeBSD 7.0 RC-1 CD-1 Installation CD.
